summary: Session 3 (final) -- Workflow, operator-choice, close-out, ship. Completed the Set 057 Lightweight dedicated-verification feature against the locked S1 contract. (1) Rewrote the Lightweight verification section of docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md as PER-SET (L1) with two modes governed by `verificationMode`: Mode A (out-of-band-or-none, the preserved copyable-prompt flow) and Mode B (dedicated-sessions) -- the operator-choice capture, the generic typed-session procedure (typed sessions take their step list from the workflow doc, not spec.md), bounded rounds (1-2 automatic, 3+ human), re-verify-only-after-real-changes, narrow later rounds, remediation-evaluates-the-verification-method-first, Critical/Major-non-fix -> awaiting-human, the seven derived states, the Q6 close-out gate, and the operator-initiated second-opinion tie-breaker (L4). (2) Updated docs/planning/session-set-authoring-guide.md: the verificationMode field semantics + once-at-set-start capture mechanism and the session `type` values. (3) CODE: the verification->remediation HAND-OFF CLOSE writer register_typed_session_handoff (atomic close-typed + open-next-typed; solves the carried rule-6 problem) plus the sanctioned `start_session --type ... --handoff` CLI; the operator-choice capture (--verification-mode + spec-config seed, made IMMUTABLE after the first record per a round-1 finding); and the Q6 close_session gate strength (hard-TTY/soft-non-TTY, terminal-close-only, --accept-suggestions bypass), with validate_dedicated_verification gaining a closing_session_number kwarg so the happy-path terminal close of the verification session itself satisfies the gate. (4) An end-to-end fixture test exercising work -> verification finds issues -> remediation -> re-verify -> terminal close. (5) Version bump dabbler-ai-router 0.15.0 -> 0.16.0 with a CHANGELOG entry and the repository-reference.md release/version walk; PyPI publish HELD for operator tag-push v0.16.0; extension untouched (no Marketplace bump). Full Python suite green (1164 passed / 1 skipped). Cross-provider session verification (gpt-5-4): round 1 ISSUES_FOUND with two Major + one Minor (verificationMode mutability; doc-authorized freehand edits; closed-verified/closed-dispositioned table overlap) -- all real, fixed in-flight with tests; round 2 VERIFIED. D3 (writer_discipline.py) left unchanged per the S1 Concrete-defect correction.
